User.title: User
User.description: User profile and metadata synced between platforms.

userId.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when account profile was last updated.

CourseProgress.title: CourseProgress
CourseProgress.description: Progress of a user within a specific learning course (Python, Java, C, etc.).

courseId.description: Identifier of the course (e.g. python, java, c).

lastAccessedAt.description: Last time user accessed this course.

DSAProblemProgress.title: DSAProblemProgress
DSAProblemProgress.description: Progress tracking for a specific Data Structure and Algorithm problem.

problemId.description: The unique identifier of the DSA problem.

submittedCode.description: The user's submitted and accepted code solution.

MockTestResult.title: MockTestResult
MockTestResult.description: Score record for placement preparation mock tests.

answers.description: Selected options mapping keyed by question ID.

UserProgress.title: UserProgress
UserProgress.description: Progress records tracking time taken on assessment questions.

assessmentId.description: The unique ID of the assessment session.

questionId.description: The unique identifier of the question.

/users/{userId}.description: Profile document containing general user profile statistics and basic details.

/users/{userId}/courseProgress/{courseId.description: Detailed progress records for each language course (Python, Java, C) under a specific user.

/users/{userId}/dsaProgress/{problemId}.description: DSA achievements, tracked problems, and successfully compiled source code.

/users/{userId}/mockTests/{testId}.description: Historic placement prep mock assessment records scored by the student.

/user_progress/{progressId}.description: Progress records containing timings and results of problem assessments.
